items.title: [正面] This is way better than I expected. The combat sys...
items.summary: This is way better than I expected. The combat system is great, and the story hooked me in right away. I still have a lot of stuff to unlock, but so far it has been great.

items.title: [负面] Terrible balance with artificially bloated enemy H...
items.summary: Terrible balance with artificially bloated enemy HP, and the story was only good for the first few chapters

items.title: [正面] The Gameplay is very indepth and sometimes I have ...
items.summary: The Gameplay is very indepth and sometimes I have no idea what ressources do what, but the core gameplay very much makes up for it. The characters are really different from each other, play very differently and I love it!

items.title: [正面] I love the actual gameplay, it's a kind of deck bu...
items.summary: I love the actual gameplay, it's a kind of deck builder with a bit of roguelite mixed in do however be warned that increasing your account's level is necessary at certain points so the pacing does feel a bit weird when you have to wait a day or more to continue the main story. The story isn't bad either! Realistically, the only problem with the actual game you might encounter is if you have bad internet as the server is located in Hong Kong and the fact that the English text is translated so the text reads like crap sometimes. Overall 8/10 and much better than I expected.

items.title: [正面] i was not expecting to be sat at my desk bawling a...
items.summary:
i was not expecting to be sat at my desk bawling at my eyes hoping a character wouldn’t do what i thought they would do
10/10 would cry again 👍

items.title: [正面] 相比较于5771同款卡牌肉鸽二游卡厄斯梦境，还是觉得5771更好呢，5771美术超绝！！！卡厄斯梦境...
items.summary: 相比较于5771同款卡牌肉鸽二游卡厄斯梦境，还是觉得5771更好呢，5771美术超绝！！！卡厄斯梦境虽说有个‘’崩坏‘’这种污染非常贴近克苏鲁，但那些ai角色什么鬼，角色外形上的克味儿几乎没有，还得是5771的希洛小姐最美了！！！！！
